= log10


Calculates the base-10 logarithm of a number.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = this.value.log10()

# In:  {"value":100}
# Out: {"new_value":2}

# In:  {"value":1000}
# Out: {"new_value":3}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.log_value = this.magnitude.log10()

# In:  {"magnitude":10000}
# Out: {"log_value":4}
----
